description: Inventory panel layout definitions — grid positions for each inventory screen.

invLeft.description: Left pixel coordinate of inventory panel

invRight.description: Right pixel coordinate of inventory panel

invTop.description: Top pixel coordinate of inventory panel

invBottom.description: Bottom pixel coordinate of inventory panel

gridRows.description: Number of rows in the inventory grid

gridCols.description: Number of columns in the inventory grid

gridLeft.description: Left pixel coordinate of inventory grid area

gridRight.description: Right pixel coordinate of inventory grid area

gridTop.description: Top pixel coordinate of inventory grid area

gridBottom.description: Bottom pixel coordinate of inventory grid area

gridBoxWidth.description: Width of each grid cell in pixels

gridBoxHeight.description: Height of each grid cell in pixels

rArmLeft.description: Left pixel coordinate of right arm slot (-1=none)

rArmRight.description: Right pixel coordinate of right arm slot

rArmTop.description: Top pixel coordinate of right arm slot

rArmBottom.description: Bottom pixel coordinate of right arm slot

rArmWidth.description: Width of right arm slot in pixels

rArmHeight.description: Height of right arm slot in pixels

torsoLeft.description: Left pixel coordinate of torso/armor slot (-1=none)
